data.title: Grayscale Just Revealed Its Top 20 Altcoins for Q3 2025: See Which Tokens Rose and Fell
data.description:
TL;DR Grayscale added Avalanche and Morpho to its Top 20 cryptocurrencies for Q3 2025, removing Lido DAO and Optimism. Avalanche stood out for its growth in transactions and partnerships, while Morpho doubled its TVL and launched a version tailored for traditional finance. The firm also updated its Crypto Sectors framework, adding a dedicated sector for. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/grayscale-just-revealed-its-top-20-altcoins-for-q3-2025-see-which-tokens-rose-and-fell/

data.title: Strategy faces multiple class-action lawsuits, accused of securities fraud in BTC treasury management
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) has faced class action lawsuits initiated by at least five law firms for suspected securities fraud due to its public statements related to Bitcoin investment. Several legal experts said that it is not uncommon for multiple law firms to compete for the position of leading plaintiff in such cases, and the leading law firm can obtain considerable legal fees. The lawsuit stems from Strategy's purchase of $7.7 billion in Bitcoin in the first quarter of 2024, resulting in nearly $6 billion in unrealized losses due to the decline in the price of the currency. At present, Strategy has responded in SEC documents that it will actively respond to the relevant allegations, but it cannot predict the outcome of the case. (Decrypt)

data.title: Legal Experts Highlight Loopholes in Cryptocurrency Payment Bans
data.description: According to PANews, despite countries like Indonesia, Russia, and Turkey prohibiting the use of cryptocurrencies for domestic payments, legal experts have noted that these nations do not explicitly ban their residents from using cryptocurrencies for transactions abroad. For instance, the Georgian travel company Tripzy has recently started accepting Tether (USDT) payments, offering more payment flexibility to tourists from these restricted countries. Experts suggest that while such cross-border payments do not violate domestic laws, they may attract the attention of global regulatory bodies like the Financial Action Task Force (FATF), especially amid rising concerns about stablecoins being used in illegal transactions.

data.title: Ethereum's Potential Surge and Altcoin Season Indicators
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum's technical analysis suggests a significant price increase, potentially reaching $10,000 in the current cycle. Analysts have pointed to Ethereum's technical setup as a precursor to a possible 'altseason,' where altcoins experience substantial gains. Crypto analyst Mikybull has highlighted Ethereum's readiness for a breakout, with the Wyckoff method indicating a potential rise to $3,200. Fellow analyst XForceGlobal shares this optimistic outlook, suggesting Ethereum could reach new all-time highs, possibly between $9,000 and $10,000. These projections are supported by historical patterns, increased institutional interest through Ethereum ETFs, and other contributing factors.

The Altcoin Season Index, which measures the performance of non-Bitcoin cryptocurrencies, signals a favorable time to invest in altcoins. Joao Wedson, founder and CEO of Alphractal, noted the index's indication of opportunity, advising investors to prepare for potential gains. Bitcoin has outperformed altcoins recently, with the index in the green zone below 20%. Wedson argues this presents a chance to accumulate altcoins while they are still lagging. Historical data shows that when the index rises above 20%, altcoins tend to outperform Bitcoin significantly.

Bitcoin dominance, a measure of Bitcoin's market share in the crypto market, is another indicator of altseason. Currently, Bitcoin dominance is at 65.77%, suggesting it is still 'Bitcoin season.' However, a full-blown altseason typically occurs when Bitcoin dominance surpasses 70% and then declines sharply. Mikybull Crypto emphasizes that a significant altseason may begin once Bitcoin dominance reaches this threshold. Popular analyst Rekt Capital notes that Bitcoin dominance is close to revisiting the 71% level, a move that historically takes one to two months after a successful retest of 64% as support.

Pseudonymous analyst The Chart Degen predicts a decrease in Bitcoin dominance in the coming weeks, advising investors to select the right altcoins for potential substantial returns. This article does not offer investment advice or recommendations. Readers are encouraged to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.

data.title: Institution: If the Fed's expectations of a rate cut in July increase, the dollar may fall
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Derek Halpenny of Mitsubishi UFJ said in a report that the dollar could fall if the market increases its bets on the Fed's July rate cut. LSEG data shows that the market expects the probability of a rate cut in July to be about 21%. "It won't take much time for the market's pricing of the Fed's easing policy to shift more convincingly to pricing in a July rate cut." He said that a weaker-than-expected non-farm payrolls report next Thursday and possibly lower inflation data on July 15 could both trigger this trend. (Jinshi)

data.title: Potential Dollar Decline Linked to July Fed Rate Cut Speculation
data.description: According to Odaily, Mitsubishi UFJ's Derek Halpenny indicated in a report that the U.S. dollar might weaken if the market increases its bets on a Federal Reserve rate cut in July. Data from LSEG suggests there is approximately a 21% chance of a rate cut in July. Halpenny noted that it would not take long for market pricing to more convincingly shift towards a July rate cut. He mentioned that a weaker-than-expected non-farm payroll report next Thursday and potentially lower inflation data on July 15 could trigger this trend.

data.title: Pepe Creator's Projects Suffer Cyberattack Resulting in Significant Losses
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain investigator ZachXBT reported on the X platform that projects associated with Pepe creator Matt Furie, including ChainSaw's Replicandy and Peplicator, were attacked in mid-June. The attack is suspected to have been carried out by mistakenly hiring North Korean IT personnel. The attackers took control of contract permissions to mint and sell NFTs, causing the floor price to plummet to zero. Initial estimates suggest total losses exceed $1 million, with approximately $310,000 stolen from ChainSaw-related projects.

data.title: U.S. Inflation Rate Expectations for June Show Slight Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the final expected inflation rate for one year in the United States for June is 5%, slightly below the anticipated 5.2% and the previous value of 5.10%. Additionally, the five to ten-year inflation rate expectation for June is finalized at 4%, which is lower than the forecasted 4.1% and the prior figure of 4.10%.

data.title: Stablecoins Emerge as Key Tool for Cross-Border Payments in Yiwu
data.description: According to Foresight News, a report by 21st Century Business Herald highlights that in Yiwu, China, a global hub for small commodities, stablecoins have become a significant tool for cross-border payments. Blockchain analytics firm Chainalysis estimates that as early as 2023, the on-chain stablecoin flow in the Yiwu market had surpassed $10 billion.

data.title: CoinLedger: The number of US users who received crypto tax letters has increased significantly in the past three months, and enforcement may be coming
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CoinLedger CEO David Kemmerer said that in the past 60 days, the crypto tax software platform CoinLedger has found that the number of US users who have received letters from the US Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has surged by 758%, and accounting firms including Taxing Cryptocurrency have also confirmed this trend. Although Trump has expressed his willingness to cancel cryptocurrency taxes in the United States, Congress has not yet proposed any relevant legislation. At the same time, there are still many investors who mistakenly believe that they do not need to declare crypto assets when filing taxes, which may be the beginning of a larger wave of law enforcement, especially with the new 1099-DA tax reporting regulations set to take effect next year. (The Block)

data.title: ZachXBT: Pepe creator-related NFT project suspected to be hacked by North Korean hackers, with losses exceeding $1 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain Detective ZachXBT posted on the X platform that Pepe creator Matt Furie and his platform ChainSaw-related projects Replicandy and Peplicator were attacked in mid-June, suspected to be carried out by North Korean IT personnel who were mistakenly hired. The attacker took over the contract authority to cast and sell NFTs, causing the floor price to return to zero. The total loss was initially estimated to be over $1 million, of which ChainSaw-related projects were stolen about $310,000.

data.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq both hit new highs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks hit new highs on Friday, driven by the latest developments in trade disputes and U.S. congressional budget negotiations. Both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite Index hit new highs as investors increasingly ignore the economic threats posed by trade wars and instability in the Middle East. Both U.S. Commerce Secretary and Treasury Secretary Bessant said the United States is close to reaching many trade agreements. Bessant said Washington hopes to complete trade negotiations with more than a dozen countries by early September. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ledger Nano S: software support ends due to memory limitations, CTO says
data.description:
CTO Charles Guillemet explains why the hardware wallet can no longer support modern security features. On May 30, Ledger officially announced the permanent end of software updates for its Nano S hardware wallet, after nine years of service.
source: https://atlas21.com/ledger-nano-s-software-support-ends-due-to-memory-limitations-cto-says/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ledger-nano-s-software-support-ends-due-to-memory-limitations-cto-says

data.title: Analysis: Stablecoin has become one of the important tools for cross-border payments in Yiwu, China
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Huatai Securities Research Report shows that in Yiwu, China, the world's small commodity center, local stablecoins have become one of the important tools for cross-border payments. Blockchain analysis company Chainalysis estimates that as early as 2023, the flow of stablecoins on the Yiwu market chain has exceeded 10 billion US dollars. (21st Century Business Herald)

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 2,117 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 5,527 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 2,117 BTC today, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 1,522 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 694,399 BTC, worth US$74.13 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 5,527 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 2,421 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 1,746,177 ETH, worth US$4.24 billion.

data.title: OpenZK Network will launch OZK staking on July 14
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OpenZK Network announced that it will launch OZK staking on July 14, allowing users to earn network rewards and empower OZK. The launch of the staking function will further enhance the functionality of OZK and effectively increase the usage scenarios.
At the same time, OpenZK announced the exploration of the dual-token gas fee model. In addition to using ETH as the network gas fee, users can also use OZK as the network gas fee. Related research and development is in progress.

data.title: Public Companies Embrace Cryptocurrency Treasury Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, DWF Ventures recently highlighted a growing trend among public companies adopting cryptocurrency treasury strategies. Over the past year, more than $40 billion has been invested in digital assets, signaling a significant shift in corporate capital management. Fourteen companies have publicly adopted this strategy, collectively holding over $76 billion in crypto assets. Notable companies include Strategy, Trump Media, GameStop, Metaplanet, Tesla, and Semler Scientific.

data.title: Binance Pay Promotion Offers EURI Rewards for Crypto Purchases in Cannes
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new promotion is set to launch through Binance Pay, offering users the opportunity to earn rewards in EURI. During the promotion period, users can receive a 5 EURI reward by completing a purchase of at least €20 equivalent in a single transaction with qualified Binance Pay merchants in Cannes, using any supported cryptocurrency via Binance Pay. The total rewards pool is capped at 9,999 EURI, with rewards available to the first 1,999 eligible users on a first-come, first-served basis. Users joining after the reward pool is exhausted will not receive any rewards. The promotion period is scheduled from 2025-06-28 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-07-06 23:59 (UTC).

To participate, users must be verified and have successfully registered for a Binance account. Access to Binance Pay requires downloading the latest Binance App or upgrading to iOS v2.47.0 or Android v2.47.0, or later. Eligibility for rewards is contingent upon meeting the minimum spending requirement with qualified merchants during the promotion period. Binance will utilize the real-time cryptocurrency to EUR exchange rate at the time of purchase to verify compliance with the spending requirement. Each eligible user can receive a maximum of one 5 EURI reward, which will be distributed within 30 days after the promotion ends. Binance retains the right to disqualify participants deemed to be acting fraudulently or not in accordance with applicable terms and conditions. Additionally, Binance reserves the right to amend or vary the terms and conditions without prior notice, including changes to the promotion's eligibility criteria and duration.

data.title: Grayscale transfers 16,350 ETH to Coinbase Prime hot wallet address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Arkham data showed that about 11 minutes ago, Grayscale transferred a total of 16,350 ETH to the Coinbase Prime hot wallet address, worth approximately US$39.8 million.

data.title: Circle: CCTP V2 already supports Polygon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle announced on the X platform that its cross-chain transmission protocol CCTP V2 has supported Polygon. Currently supported blockchains include Arbitrum, Aavx, Base, Ethereum, Optimism, World Chain, etc.
